name: Cracker
short_description: Cracker is a classic fast-paced arcade game that will hook you up trying to get the top score.
detailed_description:
Cracker is a fast-paced 2D arcade game that challenges you to destroy as many falling blocks as you can before you run out of lives. With increasingly faster falling speed, lasting even 5 minutes should be a great challenge.

Key features:

  • Three unlockable characters;
  • Practice mode - start up to level 40;
  • Short runs, usually lasting around 5 minutes;
  • 5 seconds powerups, such as X8 score and block slow down;
  • Progressively faster block falling speed;
  • Three user interface themes;
  • High-Score and High-Combo autosaving;
  • Score Leaderboard.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Indonesian, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal
